acceptance_criteria.text: Self-test endpoint validates agent key/status/scopes and writes safe ledger event.
proof: tests/test_agent_api_security.py covers success and missing-key denial.

acceptance_criteria.text: Docs explain Agent API onboarding flow.
proof: docs/api/authentication.md and docs/api/examples.md include self-test and quickstart examples.
frontend/src/pages/DocsPage.tsx includes Agent onboarding and Sandbox self-test items.

acceptance_criteria.text: Admin Agent API UI supports quickstart copy, key self-test, and self-test visibility.

acceptance_criteria.text: Superadmin morning digest includes self-test observability.

src/core/card_automation.py already calls build_agent_activity_digest for superadmins.

acceptance_criteria.text: OpenAPI and manifests include self-test safely.
proof: frontend/public/localos-agent-policy.json and localos-agent-tools.json include self-test metadata.
JSON manifests validated with python3 -m json.tool.
